title: Means of Egress — Multifamily
excerpt: Every dwelling unit shall have access to not less than two remote exits where building exceeds 3 stories or 16 dwelling units.

title: Automatic Sprinkler Systems
excerpt: An automatic sprinkler system shall be installed throughout all Group R occupancies where building is four stories or more in height.

title: Type B Dwelling Units
excerpt: At least 5 percent but not less than one unit of the total units shall be Type B dwelling units.

title: Fire Apparatus Access
excerpt: Fire apparatus access roads shall extend to within 150 feet of all portions of the building exterior.
